name: mm
description: Software development planning workflow. Guides requirements, ADRs, design specs, tech specs, and task decomposition through a structured, collaborative process.

interface.shortDescription: Structured planning workflows for software work
interface.longDescription: micromanager guides software work from requirements through ADRs, design specs, technical specs, and task decomposition, while keeping decisions in durable repository artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use mm planning to turn this feature idea into specs and tasks.
Use mm issue-triage to classify open GitHub issues.
Use mm friction-log to capture workflow feedback.
